'''pahozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickar|nickar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-h-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickar|nickar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pahozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæhezheth|pæhezheth]] || [[word:pæhezhej|pæhezhej]] || [[word:pæhezhesh|pæhezhesh]] || [[word:pæhezhe|pæhezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pahohozhoth|pahohozhoth]] || [[word:pahohozhoj|pahohozhoj]] || [[word:pahohozhosh|pahohozhosh]] || [[word:pahohozho|pahohozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pahozhoth|pahozhoth]] || [[word:pahozhoj|pahozhoj]] || [[word:pahozhosh|pahozhosh]] || [[word:pahozho|pahozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pahofzhoth|pahofzhoth]] || [[word:pahofzhoj|pahofzhoj]] || [[word:pahofzhosh|pahofzhosh]] || [[word:pahofzhof|pahofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pahozhotho|pahozhotho]] || [[word:pahozhojo|pahozhojo]] || [[word:pahozhosho|pahozhosho]] || [[word:pahozhoko|pahozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pahozhoth|pahozhoth]] || [[word:pahozhoj|pahozhoj]] || [[word:pahozhosh|pahozhosh]] || [[word:pahozho|pahozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pahozhothol|pahozhothol]] || [[word:pahozhojol|pahozhojol]] || [[word:pahozhoshol|pahozhoshol]] || [[word:pahozhokol|pahozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pahozhothotho|pahozhothotho]] || [[word:pahozhojojo|pahozhojojo]] || [[word:pahozhoshosho|pahozhoshosho]] || [[word:pahozhoko|pahozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pahozhothon|pahozhothon]] || [[word:pahozhojon|pahozhojon]] || [[word:pahozhoshon|pahozhoshon]] || [[word:pahozhokon|pahozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pahozhothoro|pahozhothoro]] || [[word:pahozhojoro|pahozhojoro]] || [[word:pahozhoshoro|pahozhoshoro]] || [[word:pahozhokoro|pahozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
